title: Jefferies flags 4 charts that show the stock sell-off could soon turn into a new rally
author: Sigma Capital
metaDescription: # Jefferies flags 4 charts that show the stock sell-off could soon turn into a new rally
excerpt: # Jefferies flags 4 charts that show the stock sell-off could soon turn into a new rally

content.introduction: # Jefferies flags 4 charts that show the stock sell-off could soon turn into a new rally
body: ![People walk past the New York Stock Exchange](https://i.insider.com/691ce28babd5e944effafc14?width=700)

The stock market has appeared particularly volatile lately, with major indexes [declining for the fourth consecutive day](https://www.businessinsider.com/tech-stocks-decline-nvidia-earnings-hd-q3-report-ai-nvda-2025-11) on Tuesday.

The tech-heavy Nasdaq 100 is down about 5.5% over the last few weeks as investors are starting to grow skeptical about the massive amount of AI infrastructure spending being pumped out by hyperscaler firms.

The [S&P 500 also just dipped below its 50-day moving average](https://www.businessinsider.com/stock-market-technical-analysis-sp500-50-day-moving-average-tech-2025-11), a move that last happened in April, when the index plunged 10% in the span of a few days.
But the worst may soon be over, according to Jefferies analyst Michael Toomey.
"I think we're setting up for a rally," Toomey said in an email on Tuesday.
Toomey flagged some charts that put the current sell-off in context and make the case that the rally could soon resume.
keyTakeaways: Key developments in Jefferies flags 4 charts that affecting market outlook
